candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not current assets; wrong section.
Non-current and not total current assets.

candidates.row_label: Adjustment for payables related to non-current assets
candidates.why: Cash flow adjustment, not a balance sheet current assets total.
Best balance-sheet cash equivalent line available; matches cash balance and reconciles closely with cash flow ending cash.
Cash but restricted; usually excluded from cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow line, not balance sheet; useful cross-check only.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the year
candidates.why: Cash flow line for prior-year opening cash, not balance sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Exchange gains/ (losses) on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX adjustment, not cash balance.
Not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash used for acquisition of businesses
candidates.why: Investing cash flow, not cash balance.
Not a cash balance.
Not a cash balance.

variables.notes: Selected balance-sheet cash line. Excluded 'Restricted cash' under standard CHE treatment.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Cash flow adjustment / non-current item, not total current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Clean current portion of long-term debt excluding leases; strong match for STD.
Short-term financing liability; include as component since no single clean current borrowings total candidate fully captures non-lease current debt without ambiguity.
Potential short-term debt line, but mostly blank and overlaps conceptually with other borrowings lines.

candidates.row_label: Reclassification of bank overdraft to financing activities
candidates.why: Cash flow reclassification, not balance sheet debt outstanding.

final_choice.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year

variables.notes: Excluded lease-related rows per rule. Chose minimal non-lease current debt components from shortlist. Did not use 'Borrowings, Short -Term' because a cleaner decomposition exists via current maturities plus overdrafts, avoiding possible overlap with commercial paper/current borrowings details.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Direct reported PPE total/net line on the balance sheet.
Only a component/alternative tangible asset line and blank here, not the preferred total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated Depreciation Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capital expenditure flow, not balance sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Proceeds from sale of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Disposal proceeds, not PPE stock.
Direct match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.
Could refer to net change in cash overall rather than operating cash flow; less precise.
Operating cash flow component, not the total.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities

variables.notes: Selected direct CFO total from cash flow statement.
